item.title: Welcome to Saskatchewan, Canada
item.description: Within 24 hours two people laid rubber on the rainbow. Cops said they can’t prove it’s a hate crime and said the school will deal with it. Within another 12 hours a giant swastika. Some people in town still saying the 2SLGBTQIA+ deserved it and shouldn’t have painted the rainbow to begin with. Fuck bigots up the ass with a pineapple! https://northeastnow.com/2025/06/12/disheartened-and-disappointed-tisdale-rcmp-investigating-after-swastika-painted-over-pride-month-crosswalk/
item.dc:creator: FrozenToMyself

https://m.youtube.com/@RealRealJapan
item.dc:creator: Freyja33

item.title: Potato's Daily Dirties
item.description:
rawr. game i cannot wait for is coming out in 20 hours and am like. want rn. havnt felt like playing anything or being social since last friday so hopefully this friday and saturday will help pull me out of my little self isolating. anyway memes. enjoy! edit: game is dis: https://store.steampowered.com/app/1601570/The_Alters/
was very evil in my discord last night. in the fun interacting way.
mhmm...
sometimes you just gotta let it happen and get it out that way. feel like thats all I have been doing with what little emotions I have left.
...could be to do with all the trauma and horrible people I have had in my life previously. feel like I am getting better at filtering out people and also now just am like. I dont want anymore. am happy with the few I have in my life rn. well okay maybe a couple more. idk.
...
but its pretty. and not ai cause I just checked.
...
...
I dont know if my broken mind will ever believe this. think those neural pathways are pretty locked in and corrective thinking doesnt seem to change them much.
sometimes I am still like. oh. I have followers. I have people that like my memes and enjoy them. hm.
mhmm.
oh boy.
really trying to have discipline with myself and moving forward and also struggling with it so much.
yup.
oh yea. spread it.
...
o.
...
...
...
i dunno about that. kinda sick of these feelings things.
mhmm.
oh is this the other part to the one I posted the other day?
The above image was made by the wonderful @PyroDragon! They have their own channel in the Deviousness discord where they share links to their dumps and be an all around dragony dragon! I has a Deviousness discord server! We do have a hard rule of no politics and/or religion. The discord is a safe space to get away from the bullshit going on. We have a bunch of areas including a SFW area, content creator area, a NSFW area and more! We have gaming fun! We have spontaneous gaming and some ping roles for people to use to get groups together based on US and EU time zones! We will be doing DnD things in the future here shortly. Will be interesting. So feel free to wander in and say haii! Thank you to everyone who has joined and made it such a unique and special place! Deviousness discord that is 18+: https://discord.gg/deviousness If you have issues with link see dis: https://imgur.com/a/8GUNAz4 Deviousness steam group: https://steamcommunity.com/groups/DeviousnessDiscord
artist of work above (aside from my signing potato on it): https://florahv.artstation.com/projects/XnL8P3 "I stand before you as a tower of strength, the weight of the world on my shoulders. As you pass through my life, look, but not too close, for I fear I will expose the vulnerable me." -Deidra Sarault "We tend to think of the rational as a higher order, but it is the emotional that marks our lives. One often learns more from ten days of agony than from ten years of contentment." -Merle Shain "My lifetime listens to yours." -Muriel Rukeyser "What people really need is a good listening to." Mary Lou Casey I am on dis now and trying to remember to linky over there too for when I post and also post the memes that get removed: https://bsky.app/profile/potatocheesmonk.bsky.social I has a post with links to all my past posts. enjoy: https://imgur.com/a/ZDA2CBe #deliciousness #potato #memes #dailydirties
item.dc:creator: PotatoCheesMonk

item.title: God, I miss George.
item.description: I'm woefully grateful that he didn't live long enough to see some of this shit going on right now. Yea we would have had some laughs, but it would have probably shattered his soul at the state of things.
item.dc:creator: MayMyEnemiesLiveLong

item.title: Spaceballs II: The Search for More Money officially announced
item.dc:creator: Kalli

item.title: Got my neighbor locked out
item.description:
I forgot my key and called her for help. In coming to open the main door, she forgot her door was locked and closed it behind her. No keys, no phone. Dogs locked inside. I got Gimli situated, let work know I'd be late, and went to hang out with B on her patio. The weather was gorgeous and we sat among her flowers.
The maintenance guy was on his way to our area anyway so it was a super quick rescue. She reminds me my aunts and we bonded pretty quickly when she moved in. She also cooks too much and gives us meals. Last dish was crab rangoon.
item.dc:creator: LadyRex

item.title: The 519th vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps - Pride Month 2025 ep 9
item.description:
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild *every other* Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you either when I post or when I go Viral. If you wish to chat, I'm frequently in ElbowDeepInAHorse (The Stable) and PotatoCheesMonk's (Deviousness) Discord Servers between the hours of 7pm and 1am GMT-5 during the week, and at unpredictable but frequent times Saturdays and Sundays. These are both VERY safe places for LGBTQIA+ people, if you need a community, please stop in! AbbiiStabbii's server is also amazing, *especially* safe for Trans folk.
AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
OC (In legal terms, "Petit" is an alternate spelling of "Petty". I don't know why.) Small women are often described as "Petite", and small men (when El Gibbity), Twinks.
Those are rookie numbers
As a Bisexual, I always thought this was the defining difference between Bi and Pan/Omni. I'm not actually sure the claim here is accurate.
Except the side of Morally Good (Antifa)
@DefinitelyNotMadeOfBees ‽
YES!
This is my newly commissioned Signature Image, by Dark Arts Studios. He's no longer on The Imgurs, I met him on ElbowDeepInAHorse's Discord Server. Here's where you can see his work: https://twitter.com/Anubis23342060 https://www.furaffinity.net/user/thed4rk1ord/ https://tailsofthegods.com/ https://dark-arts.itch.io/ FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq Updated Whenever I Can Get Around To It #LGBTQIA #PrideMonth #Pride_Month #Pride #LGBTPride #Phone_Dump #Meme_Dump #Memes #MeeMays #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple #GregFromHR #SteveFromAccounting #DougFromSales
item.dc:creator: PyroDragon
